message:
vcr: add oauth_refresh_invalid_matches_after_redaction test

New test verifies that VCR request matching works correctly with
OAuth refresh token cassettes after sensitive fields are redacted.

The test:
1. Loads oauth_refresh_invalid.json cassette
2. Extracts client_id from the recorded request body
3. Constructs an incoming request with matching structure
4. Verifies request_matches returns true

This ensures the VCR playback correctly identifies OAuth refresh
requests even when refresh_token values differ (since they're
redacted during recording).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
